chapter_goal: Build smooth length structures from tangent norms through geodesics, hyperbolic models, sub-Riemannian reachability, volume, and Besikovitch lower bounds.

source_span.source_use: orientation, terminology, section order, and theorem targets only

visual_sequence.concept: Riemannian metric coefficients and length integration
visual_sequence.representation: density field, tangent-unit ellipses, sampled curve
visual_sequence.validation: positive definiteness on grid and finite curve length ratio

visual_sequence.representation: sphere exponential map rays and wavefronts
visual_sequence.validation: unit endpoint norm and radial/angular orthogonality residual

visual_sequence.representation: interactive disk geodesics, horocycles, ideal boundary
visual_sequence.validation: disk distance invariant under sampled isometry

visual_sequence.representation: norm unit balls, density bars, CSV table
visual_sequence.validation: Euclidean l2 normalization equals one for two density formulas

visual_sequence.representation: warped-square model and proof dependency graph
visual_sequence.validation: area integral exceeds product of face-distance lower bounds
